title: Newman and Cole Large Garden Dustpan and Brush Set - Outdoor Dust Pan Scoop with Stiff Hand Brush
features: GARDEN DUSTPAN AND BRUSH TOOL SET - Sweeping up in your yard and garden has never been so easy! Keep your paths, driveways and outdoor areas tidy with the dustpan and brush set.
STRONG OUTDOOR DUST PAN SET - Indoor dustpan and brush sets just aren't up to the job. This specially designed outdoor dustpan has a reinforced pan to give it extra strength.

HEAVY DUTY LARGE CAPACITY DUSTPAN SCOOP - When sweeping up outdoor you need a tool up to the job. The dust pan scoop is perfect for clearing leaves and grass cuttings and the extra wide pan allows for maximum capacity sweeping before emptying.

GARDEN SHOVEL AND STIFF HARD BRUSH SET - The dustpan comes with a wooden stiff sweeping hand brush with hard natural bristles. Perfect for sweeping up and cleaning your garden paths and greenhouse etc!
TRUSTED BRAND - Newman and Cole know what you want from a broom and brush and aim to deliver exactly that with this garden dustpan and brush set.
description: Product Description N&C Large Garden Dustpan and Brush Set Perfect for sweeping dried leaves, soil, and grit on rough surfaces. A rugged brush and pan set that can handle the outdoors. Multi-purpose Garden Dustpan and Brush From patios to pathways, this garden dustpan and brush outdoor set removes dirt, leaves, and gravel with ease—thanks to stiff bassine bristles and a durable wide-mouth dust pan. Previous page Garden Dustpan and Brush For Outdoor Cleaning Garden dustpan and brush outdoor set removes dirt, leaves, and gravel with ease. Stiff Hand Brush Stiff Bassine Bristles Perfect for sweeping dried leaves, soil, and grit on rough surfaces. Easy Dirt Removal Serrated Edges Use the built-in serrated edge on the dust pan brushes set to remove dirt stuck in the bristles. For Floor Contact Rubber Lip Dustpan has a rubber lip that creates tight contact with the ground for efficient sweeping. Next page 1 For Outdoor Cleaning 2 Stiff Bassine Bristles 3 Serrated Edges 4 Rubber Lip Versatile Dustpan and Brush For Cleaning Patio, Decking, Driveways, Garden etc Clean up your garden with ease using this heavy duty garden dustpan and brush set, designed to tackle outdoor messes from patios, decking, driveways, and garden paths. The natural bassine stiff hand brush sweeps up leaves, sand, mud, and small stones with power and precision. The durable dustpan features a wide mouth, rubber edge for tight floor contact, and serrated sides to clean the brush bristles with ease. Is this dustpan and brush set suitable for outdoor use? Yes! This is a garden dustpan and brush outdoor set made for heavy-duty sweeping. It handles leaves, dirt, mud, and grit with ease. Will this dust pan pick up fine dust or only large debris? It’s great for both! The rubber-edged dustpan creates close contact with the ground, letting you collect sand, soil, or even fine dust efficiently. Does it work well for collecting garden leaves or compost? Definitely. Use it as a garden scoop or leaf collector—it’s large, sturdy, and fits plenty of material at once. How does the serrated edge help during cleaning? The serrated edge on the dust pan and brush set helps clean stuck debris like twigs and dirt from the brush bristles, keeping them fresh for every use. Is this brush softer or stiff? Can I use it on decking or stone? It features natural stiff bassine bristles, perfect for rough surfaces like decking, stone tiles, or paving slabs. It’s part of a reliable dustpan & brush set heavy duty enough for outdoor areas.
